title: Tangy Crumbly British Double Cream Gratin
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring a tangy and crumbly double cream topping, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the double cream, Gruy0 cheese, and salt. Mix until smooth and well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix the flour and unsalted butter to form a crumbly mixture.
Press the crumbly mixture into the bottom of a 20 cm (8 in) clay pot or Talavera-plate.
Pour the double cream mixture over the crumbly base.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese on top of the double cream mixture.
Place the clay pot or Talavera-plate in a larger baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the pot.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the centre is set.
Let the gratin cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
